user.title: GTX2 Watch
user.description: Add the GTX2 watch hub. Watches, nodes, gridwatts and media are configured afterwards via the integration options.

watches.title: Watches
watches.description: One watch per line:  slug = Name = MAC  (e.g.  watch4 = Kitchen = F4:4E:FD:11:22:33). Add a line to add a watch, delete a line to remove one. An empty MAC keeps the watch but disables it (no entities). Entities + services rebuild automatically on save. MACs stay on the VM — never in YAML or the repo.

data.watches: Watches (slug = Name = MAC, one per line)

nodes.title: Room nodes
nodes.description: One node per line:  prefix = Room  (e.g.  gtx2_garage = Garage). Add a line to add a room node — last match wins. Each node gets an online sensor automatically.

data.www_url_base: HA base URL the nodes fetch /local/ from

buzz.name: Buzz
buzz.description: Ring/buzz a watch to find it (host-bridge fallback when no node holds the link).

sync_time.name: Sync time
sync_time.description: Sync the watch clock to now.

set_time_custom.name: Set time (custom / live-kW)
set_time_custom.description: Node-only RTC live-value write: hour+minute = real clock, day = integer kW, second = tenths kW (drives the live-kW face, no image re-push).

release_link.name: Release link
release_link.description: Drop the node's BLE link to the watch. Node-only.

push_weather.name: Push weather
push_weather.description: Push the current weather frame (skips when weather.home is unavailable).

set_alarm.name: Set alarm
set_alarm.description: [INFERRED] Set an alarm slot; fields default from the Push-view helpers when omitted. Node-only.

switch_dial.name: Switch dial
switch_dial.description: [INFERRED] Switch to an installed face; defaults from the Push-view selects when omitted. Node-only.

push_text.name: Push text (rendered face)
push_text.description: GATED — render text to a dial face via blobd. Node-only.

push_text_label.name: Push text (glanceable)
push_text_label.description: Ride the weather city line with short text + live temperature. Node-only.

push_notification.name: Push notification
push_notification.description: Render a notification watch-face on the host-bridge and push it. Host-bridge only.

push_face.name: Push face (grid-watts gauge)
push_face.description: Fetch the rendered gauge from blobd and stream it chunked to the holder.

watts.name: Watts
watts.description: Signed grid power baked into the gauge.
